infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: DriveMate needs your location to show nearby drivers and track your ride.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: DriveMate needs your location to provide real-time tracking during rides.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: DriveMate needs camera access to capture documents and profile photos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: DriveMate needs photo library access to upload documents and profile photos.
